mnemonics.title: Hash Algorithm Strength
mnemonics.content: MD5 - Mostly Dangerous (for security), SHA-1 - Somewhat Hackable, SHA-256 - Secure Hash Algorithm

mnemonics.title: File Identification Steps
mnemonics.content: FIST: File type, Identify signatures, Scan metadata, Test with tools

mnemonics.title: Magic Bytes Remember
mnemonics.content: MZ Means Microsoft, PK Packed Kontainer, %PDF Pretty Dangerous Files
